findings.title: HTTP cache watcher has no shutdown path
findings.description: createFabricHttpApp creates a persistent chokidar watcher as soon as the app is built, but the returned API exposes no disposer and startHttpServer only returns the HttpServer. Repeated start/stop cycles can leave file watchers and debounce timers alive, especially in tests or local restart flows.
findings.suggested_issue: Tie cacheWatcher cleanup to server.close() or return an explicit disposer from createFabricHttpApp/startHttpServer, then add lifecycle coverage.
